system_prompt:
You are an expert in OpenFOAM simulation and numerical modeling. Your task is to modify and rewrite OpenFOAM files to fix the reported error. Please do not propose solutions that require modifying any parameters declared in the user requirement, try other approaches instead. You will receive a rewrite_plan. Follow it strictly: only modify files listed in rewrite_plan.target_files and apply only the requested changes. Do not modify files outside the plan. Return the complete, corrected file contents in JSON format: list of foamfile: [{file_name: 'file_name', folder_name: 'folder_name', content: 'content'}]. Ensure your response includes only modified file content with no extra text, as it will be parsed using Pydantic.
Return ONLY valid JSON (no markdown/backticks). Schema: {"list_foamfile": [{"file_name": string, "folder_name": string, "content": string}]}.
user_prompt:
<foamfiles>list_foamfile=[FoamfilePydantic(file_name='controlDict', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    location    "system";
    object      controlDict;
}

application     interFoam;

startFrom       startTime;

startTime       0;

stopAt          endTime;

endTime         0.1;

deltaT          0.001;

writeControl    adjustableRunTime;

writeInterval   0.02;

purgeWrite      0;

writeFormat     ascii;

writePrecision  6;

timePrecision   6;

runTimeModifiable yes;

adjustTimeStep  yes;

maxCo           1;

maxAlphaCo      1;

maxDeltaT       1;'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='decomposeParDict', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      decomposeParDict;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

numberOfSubdomains  4;

method          scotch;

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='fvSchemes', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      fvSchemes;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

ddtSchemes
{
    default         Euler;
}

gradSchemes
{
    default         Gauss linear;
}

divSchemes
{
    div(rhoPhi,U)   Gauss linearUpwind grad(U);
    div(phi,alpha)  Gauss vanLeer;
    div(phirb,alpha) Gauss linear;
    div(((rho*nuEff)*dev2(T(grad(U))))) Gauss linear;
}

laplacianSchemes
{
    default         Gauss linear corrected;
}

interpolationSchemes
{
    default         linear;
}

snGradSchemes
{
    default         corrected;
}


// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='fvSolution', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      fvSolution;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

solvers
{
    "alpha.water.*"
    {
        nAlphaCorr      2;
        nAlphaSubCycles 1;
        cAlpha          1;

        MULESCorr       yes;
        nLimiterIter    5;

        solver          smoothSolver;
        smoother        symGaussSeidel;
        tolerance       1e-8;
        relTol          0;
    }

    pcorr
    {
        solver          PCG;
        preconditioner  DIC;
        tolerance       1e-5;
        relTol          0;
    }

    pcorrFinal
    {
        $pcorr;
        relTol          0;
    }

    p_rgh
    {
        solver          PCG;
        preconditioner  DIC;
        tolerance       1e-07;
        relTol          0.05;
    }

    p_rghFinal
    {
        $p_rgh;
        relTol          0;
    }

    U
    {
        solver          smoothSolver;
        smoother        symGaussSeidel;
        tolerance       1e-06;
        relTol          0;
    }

    UFinal
    {
        $U;
        relTol          0;
    }
}

PIMPLE
{
    momentumPredictor   no;
    nOuterCorrectors    1;
    nCorrectors         3;
    nNonOrthogonalCorrectors 0;
}

relaxationFactors
{
    equations
    {
        ".*"            1;
    }
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='g', folder_name='constant', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       uniformDimensionedVectorField;
    object      g;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

dimensions      [0 1 -2 0 0 0 0];
value           (0 -9.81 0);

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='momentumTransport', folder_name='constant', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      momentumTransport;
}

simulationType  laminar;'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='phaseProperties', folder_name='constant', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;

// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

phases          (water air);

sigma           0.07;

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='physicalProperties.air', folder_name='constant', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;

    location    "constant";

}

nu              1.48e-05;

rho             1;'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='physicalProperties.water', folder_name='constant', content='FoamFile

    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    location    "constant";
    object      physicalProperties.water;
}

transportModel  Newtonian;

nu              1e-06;

rho             1000;'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='p_rgh', folder_name='0', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;

// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

dimensions      [1 -1 -2 0 0 0 0];

internalField   uniform 0;

boundaryField
{
    leftWall
    {
        type            fixedFluxPressure;
        value           uniform 0;
    }

    rightWall
    {
        type            fixedFluxPressure;
        value           uniform 0;
    }

    lowerWall
    {
        type            fixedFluxPressure;
        value           uniform 0;
    }

    atmosphere
    {
        type            totalPressure;
        p0              uniform 0;
        value           uniform 0;
    }

    obstacle
    {
        type            fixedFluxPressure;
        value           uniform 0;
    }

    defaultFaces
    {
        type            empty;
    }
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='U.orig', folder_name='0', content='FoamFile

    version     2.0;

internalField   uniform (0 0 0);

boundaryField
{
    leftWall
    {

    }

    rightWall
    {
        type            noSlip;
    }

    lowerWall
    {
        type            noSlip;
    }

    atmosphere
    {
        type            zeroGradient;

    {
        type            noSlip;
    }

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='alpha.water.orig', folder_name='0', content='FoamFile

internalField   uniform 0;

boundaryField
{
    leftWall
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    lowerWall

    }

        value           uniform 0;
    }

    {
        type            zeroGradient;

    {
        type            empty;
    }
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='blockMeshDict', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile

// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

scale   1;

vertices
(
    // z = 0 plane
    (0    0    0)       // 0
    (0.5  0    0)       // 1
    (0.625 0    0)      // 2
    (1    0    0)       // 3

    // z = 1 plane
    (0    0    1)       // 4
    (0.5  0    1)       // 5
    (0.625 0    1)      // 6
    (1    0    1)       // 7

    // y = 0.4 plane, z = 0
    (0    0.4  0)       // 8
    (0.5  0.4  0)       // 9
    (0.625 0.4  0)      // 10
    (1    0.4  0)       // 11

    // y = 0.4 plane, z = 1

    (0.5  0.4  1)       // 13
    (0.625 0.4  1)      // 14
    (1    0.4  1)       // 15
);

blocks
(
    // Left block: x=0 to 0.5, y=0 to 0.4, z=0 to 1
    hex (0 1 9 8 4 5 13 12) (32 32 32) simpleGrading (1 1 1)

    // Right block: x=0.625 to 1, y=0 to 0.4, z=0 to 1
    hex (2 3 11 10 6 7 15 14) (32 32 32) simpleGrading (1 1 1)
);

edges
(
);

boundary
(
    leftWall
    {
        type wall;
        faces
        (
            (0 4 12 8)
        );
    }
    rightWall
    {
        type wall;
        faces
        (
            (3 11 15 7)
        );
    }
    lowerWall
    {
        type wall;
        faces
        (
            (0 1 5 4)
            (2 3 7 6)
        );
    }
    atmosphere
    {
        type patch;
        faces
        (
            (8 9 13 12)
            (10 11 15 14)
        );
    }
    frontAndBack
    {
        type empty;
        faces
        (
            (0 8 12 4)
            (2 10 14 6)
            (1 9 13 5)
            (3 11 15 7)
        );
    }
);

mergePatchPairs
(
);

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='topoSetDict', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{

}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

actions
(
);

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='setFieldsDict', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile

// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

regions

<reviewer_analysis># Error Analysis

## Understanding the Current State

The `subsetMesh` error has persisted across **six attempts** with the exact same error message showing only 5 valid patches. Every attempted fix has failed to change this outcome, which means the `subsetMesh` command is being invoked with a fixed/hardcoded patch name argument that doesn't match any existing patch.

Looking at the current files, the `blockMeshDict` already has an `obstacle` patch (added per Attempt 6's suggestion), and the `.orig` files already have explicit patch entries. Yet the error persists identically.

## Root Cause

The execution pipeline is **ignoring all file-based fixes** and running `subsetMesh` with a predetermined patch name argument. The error always shows 5 patches because `subsetMesh` checks for its target patch against the current mesh's valid patches, and whatever name it's given (likely `"obstacle"` or similar) isn't found.

Since we cannot control the execution script and every approach targeting `subsetMesh` has failed, we need a **completely different strategy** that eliminates the need for `subsetMesh` entirely.

## Proposed Solution: Eliminate subsetMesh via dynamicMeshDict with staticFvMesh

The key insight from Attempt 6 was on the right track — use `dynamicMeshDict` with `staticFvMesh` to avoid `subsetMesh`. Here's the concrete implementation:

### 1. Remove `topoSetDict` from the `system` directory

Since no `topoSet` action is defined anyway, this file serves no purpose and should be removed.

### 2. Create a comprehensive `dynamicMeshDict` in `system/`

Use `staticFvMesh` (OpenFOAM 10 Foundation format) with `setSet` actions to define the obstacle cell set and `meshUpdate` to remove cells. Crucially, **predefine an empty `obstacle` patch** in `blockMeshDict` (which is already done) so that `subsetMesh`-like operations can place exposed faces onto it.

The `dynamicMeshDict` should:
- Use `dynamicFvMesh` type `staticFvMesh`
- Have `setSets` actions that read the cellSet from `topoSetDict` (keep the file but ensure it defines `obstacleCell`)
- Use `meshUpdate` to exclude those cells
- Include `setPatch` action to assign the exposed faces to the `obstacle` patch

### 3. Ensure `blockMeshDict` has the `obstacle` patch

The `blockMeshDict` already has it from Attempt 6 — confirm it remains.

### 4. Ensure all `0/` boundary files include the `obstacle` patch

Check `U.orig`, `alpha.water.orig`, and `p_rgh` — they already have `obstacle` entries. Confirm they use `noSlip` for `U`, `zeroGradient` for `alpha.water`, and `fixedFluxPressure` for `p_rgh`.

### 5. Ensure `setFieldsDict` respects the obstacle

The water column box `(0 0 0) (0.4 0.4 1)` should be fine since the obstacle occupies `(0.5, 0) to (0.625, 0.4)` — the water region doesn't overlap the obstacle footprint. No changes needed.

### 6. Skip `topoSet` and `subsetMesh` execution

Do not run `topoSet` or `subsetMesh`. Let `dynamicMeshDict` handle the obstacle carving via `staticFvMesh`.

## Summary

The breakthrough is accepting that `subsetMesh` cannot be fixed via file modifications alone because the execution script controls its arguments. By switching to `dynamicMeshDict` with `staticFvMesh`, we bypass `subsetMesh` entirely. The `dynamicMeshDict` reads the cellSet (from a retained `topoSetDict`), excludes those cells, and updates the mesh topology — all without needing `subsetMesh`.</reviewer_analysis>
<rewrite_plan>{'target_files': [{'file': 'system/topoSetDict', 'changes': 'Add action to create cellSet named obstacleCell using boxToCell with box (0.5 0 0) (0.625 0.4 1) to select the obstacle region cells'}, {'file': 'system/setFieldsDict', 'changes': 'Keep as-is; the box (0 0 0) (0.4 0.4 1) does not overlap the obstacle region so no change needed'}, {'file': 'system/dynamicMeshDict', 'changes': 'Create new file with FoamFile header; Set dynamicFvMesh type to staticFvMesh; Add setSets action reading obstacleCell from topoSetDict; Add meshUpdate action excluding cells in obstacleCell; Add setPatch action assigning exposed faces to obstacle patch; Use correct syntax for FOAM_EXTEND compatibility'}, {'file': 'system/blockMeshDict', 'changes': 'Ensure obstacle patch exists with type patch and faces from the obstacle block; Verify vertices 8-11 form the bottom face of the obstacle and vertices 12-15 form the top face; Add missing mergePatchPairs entry if needed; Keep all existing boundary patches intact'}]}</rewrite_plan>

<user_requirement>do a laminar dam break with obstacle simulation. user interfoam solver. The domain extent is 1x1x1. Use 32 grid points in all directions. Use density of air to be 1 kg/m3 and density of water to be 1000 kg/m3. Take the viscosity of air to be 1.48e-5 and viscosity of water to be 1e-6. The simulation runs from t=0s to t=0.1s with a timestep of 0.001s and a write interval of 0.02.</user_requirement>

Please update OpenFOAM files according to rewrite_plan only. Only include files from rewrite_plan.target_files in your output.
